name: Oatmeal Raisin (Macm)
recipeInstructions: (Recipe may be halved) Preheat oven to 375°F. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except oats and raisins; mix until smooth. Stir in oats and raisins. Drop by heaping teaspoons (about 2 tablespoons) about 2 inches apart on greased cookie sheets. Bake for 9-13 minutes until light golden brown. Immediately remove from cookie sheets. Makes about 3 dozen cookies. Source: Pillsbury, Festive Baking
